calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calender this day for Default Judgment as to Defendant Standard Construction of San Francisco Inc. DBA Standard Roofing Company and Defendant Thomas Sesktak Thomas M. Sestak AKA Thomas Martin Sestak AKA Tom Sestak DBA Standard Roofing Co.

Dept.505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:26 a.m. and concluding at 9:29 a.m.. (D505)

Eric Jun, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. by Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Standard Construction of San Francisco Inc. DBA Standard Roofing Company not appearing.
Defendant Thomas Sesktak Thomas M. Sestak AKA Thomas Martin Sestak AKA Tom Sestak DBA Standard Roofing Co. not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff Luther Jao was placed under oath.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract filed February 1, 2023.
Proof of Substituted service as to Defendant Standard Construction of San Francisco Inc. DBA Standard Roofing Company effectuated on February 20, 2023.
Proof of Substituted service as to Defendant Thomas Sesktak Thomas M. Sestak AKA Thomas Martin Sestak AKA Tom Sestak DBA Standard Roofing Co. effectuated on February 21, 2023.
Default entered as to both Defendants on March 23, 2023.
Dismissal as to Defendant Does 1 through 10 filed April 18, 2023.

The Court confirms damages, interest, attorney's fees and costs with Plaintiff. Plaintiff affirms the amount sought.

The Court rules by declaration and written statements in favor of the Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Standard Construction of San Francisco Inc. DBA Standard Roofing Company and Defendant Thomas Sesktak Thomas M. Sestak AKA Thomas Martin Sestak AKA Tom Sestak DBA Standard Roofing Co. as follows:

Plaintiff is to recover from Defendants:

Damages $164,011.42
Interest $15,332.10
Attorney's Fees $1,200.00
Costs $697.44

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
